results.command: PORT=6397; SERVER=/data/tmp/cargo-target/release-perf/frankenredis; BENCH=/data/tmp/cargo-target/release-perf/fr-bench; LOG=artifacts/optimization/frankenredis-ohsk5/pass126-fused-get/baseline-server.log; JSON=artifacts/optimization/frankenredis-ohsk5/pass126-fused-get/baseline-last.json; "$SERVER" --port "$PORT" >"$LOG" 2>&1 & srv=$!; sleep 0.15; "$BENCH" --port "$PORT" --workload get --clients 50 --requests 1000000 --pipeline 16 --json-out "$JSON" >/dev/null; status=$?; kill "$srv" 2>/dev/null || true; wait "$srv" 2>/dev/null || true; exit "$status"
